dialogue: It looks like the perfect day to sit and enjoy my tea.
But remember... not everything in this place is truly like how it seems.
Take care... some doors are better left unopened.
Son, you need to pay attention to what others ignore.

intro: So… you can see me.
Good. That means you're not like the others.
This place wasn't always like this.
Something broke and now things are slipping through.
And somehow you got pulled into all of this.
quest: I can't fight like this.
My power... it's tied to my guitar.
It was shattered. The strings were scattered.
Find them... all of them.
Then come back to me.
after_collect: This curse... it's out of this world.
This guitar is more than just an instrument.
after_play: You didn’t just play a song.

intro: As you see, things are getting worse here.
And it's your mission to finish what you started.
quest: There's something buried in the system.
The terminal in the SC Lab will ask you for a code.
You need to translate it correctly.
Good luck, and don't stay there for too long.
Remember to look at numbers differently.
Not everything is read the same way.
after_quest: Albert?... The nameless monster has a name now.
I'm not sure you can handle what's coming next.
But there's no choice but to move forward.

wrong_code: Try converting the code to something else.

intro: Stop.
You're not supposed to be here.
This system was sealed for a reason.
You made it further than anyone else.
Most people would have stopped by now...
or worse...disappeared.
That means the sound didn't break you.
...not yet.

start: There's someone you need to see.
For three years he was ahead of everyone.
Or maybe he speaks in a language no one understands.
Symbols, fragments, things that don't make sense.
find_paper: You won’t understand them like this.
There must be something that helps you read it.
after_find_paper: Try to understand what he's saying.
after_decoding: Names make things easier to find.
And some of these things should never be found.

intro: Memories don't just disappear.
They leave echoes of what once existed.
And this includes all of what happened in this place.
quest: What you're about to see are not just movie reviews.
They were altered... on purpose.
Some words are missing.
Not erased...hidden.
Each missing word is a piece of something bigger.
Piece them all together.
Each one brings you closer to the truth...
The truth that has been leashed for too long.
after_quest: People think discovering the truth brings clarity.
But sometimes it only makes thoughts louder in your head.
Be careful of what's coming your way.

intro: You felt it, didn't you?
Something changed when you said that sentence.
That was a trigger to something beyond
quest: The Great Warrior, Yagami
He's one of the guardians of this secret
He doesn't appear unless something goes wrong
And obviously something did.
At this point...he already noticed what happened
He's on the way, be ready.
And you must always remember one thing.
All actions have consequences.
after_quest: Go to the Data Center to find out how will you end this mess.
